title: pelargonium × valleti
intro: Pelargonium × valleti, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium roseum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to South Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing stress and anxiety. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to improve sleep quality, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and salves, and can be found in various natural remedies and skincare products.
